rulings.Case Title: EMELIE B SANTANA VS. BANK OF AMERICA HOME LOANS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 9, line 1. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to August 9, 2013. Bay Area Legal Advocates, PC and Stevan John Henrioulle are ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6B (See March 18, 2013 ruling) and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than July 2, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TODD QUACKENBUSH VS. TODD DJUREEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion For Hearing On Partition
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 09, 2013, line 10. Re-Notice Of Motion For Hearing On Partition DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN FULLER et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 09, 2013, line 8. Petition To Restrain Defendants' Foreclosure Sale Of Plaintiffs' Home OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff failed to comply with TRO/OSC order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RINA BELLO VS. JAVIER TENORIO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons Seviced With Third Amended Complaihnt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 09, 2013, line 11. DEFENDANT SALAZAR, HARVEY, SUED AS HARVEY SALAZAR AKA HARVEY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons Seviced With Third Amended Complaint DENIED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges provisions of the Lease "that form the basis for the complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 09, 2013, line 4 Demurrer Of Defendant Mariano I. Garcia To Complaint Of Plaintiff Perdo Garcia SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Notice fatally defective. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GENARA MANDAC VS. GENARO PARAYNO JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of Defendant Genaro Parayno, Jr. To Complaint Of Plaintiff Genara Mandac

Demurrer Of Defendant Genaro Parayno, Jr. To Complaint Of Plaintiff Genara Mandac OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO VS. REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Amended Summons And First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 09, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT REBECCA ALONZI, SEASONAL ELEGANCE CATERING, LLC, D.B.A. REBECCA, REBECCA JEAN CATERING, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Amended Summons And First Amended Complaint DENIED. First Amended Complaint, Notice and Summons sufficiently allege that only one business entity using several names is a named defendant served with unlawful detainer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges causes of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO VS. REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 09, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT REBECCA ALONZI, SEASONAL ELEGANCE CATERING, LLC, D.B.A. REBECCA, REBECCA JEAN CATERING, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges causes of action for unlawful detainer and case 13-530058 is not based on the "same cause," i.e. possession of premises pursuant to "30 Day Notice." Additionally, Demurrer is untimely per CCP 1005. Defendants' counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 09, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT LOGAN LAUGHLIN MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED, 5 days to respond. = (501/REQ)
